items.title: I can confirm the Raptors signing Kyle Anderson for a one-year, $3.9 million deal (veteran minimum), per a team source. Raps now have 13 players on standard NBA deals. A team needs to carry at least 14 in regular season.
items.author: Eric Koreen

items.title: Kyle Anderson signs with Toronto
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Kyle Anderson signs with Toronto Yahoo Sports

items.title: [Charania] Free agent forward Kyle Anderson has agreed to a one-year, $3.9 million deal with the Toronto Raptors, sources tell ESPN. Anderson enters his 13th NBA season providing depth to the Raptors roster, and reunites with former San Antonio teammate Kawhi Leonard.
items.author: MembershipSingle7137
